scene_title: Estatua imperial romana com detalhe dourado
narrative_beat: Rosto de imperador em marmore branco e carmesim

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid Roman imperial marble statue with painted gold and crimson details showing emperor face with total authority expression and laurel crown in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the emperor's face with total authority expression and laurel crown
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated museum hall with other statues and tiny visitors in background

mood.emotion: Domitian's image as prototype of the beast

symbolism.primary: the emperor-idol as first iteration of Revelation 13:15
symbolism.secondary: laurel crown as prototype of the mark of authority

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
